title: ABetterMinecraft
description: Just a better Minecraft that we made that optimize your experience with Client-side mods and soon adding older and newer versions. We bought an THINKPAD T14 (Worst laptop) and tested the modpack and it worked very well.Obtimize your game now!
body: ![# ** BetterMC](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95e2d9c9b9a3eb63a010bb7507c31867ccdbc5fc.png) If your a developer or a owner of one of a mod included in this modpack, please contact me. Discord: @**da.realc** Just a better Minecraft that we made that optimize your experience with Client-side mods and soon adding older and newer versions. We bought an THINKPAD T14 (Worst laptop) and tested the modpack and it worked very well.Obtimize your game now using ABetterMinecraft! Credits: Patqrick, Any authors mods used in this modpack, and You (for playing!)
